title: Optimizer Metrics chart blank on ProcedureTask (lines/axes/grid disappear)
description:
## Problem
Users still report the Optimizer Metrics chart renders as blank except legend/squares.

## Behavior Spec
Feature: Optimizer Metrics chart rendering
Scenario: Render chart with cycle data
Given the procedure has recent/regression metrics
When the chart is shown
Then axes, grid, labels, and metric lines/dots are visible
And legend-only rendering does not occur.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Created fix branch from develop and beginning implementation/validation for blank optimizer chart rendering bug.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Applied fix by cherry-picking commit b6461732b onto a branch from current develop (new commit 81e908eab), removing the unstable axis polish (ResizeObserver + y-axis label props) that correlated with blank chart rendering. Verification passed: OptimizerMetricsChart and ProcedureTask optimizer tests.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Applying follow-up visual tweak: reduce Optimizer Metrics chart side padding/margins so plotting area is wider without changing metric behavior.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Adjusted chart layout per feedback: widened plot area by reducing wrapper padding and right margin, shifted x labels inward with XAxis padding, added y-axis tick margin, and added explicit AC1/Acc labels under left/right scales via overlay text (without Recharts axis-label props). Tests pass for OptimizerMetricsChart and ProcedureTask optimizer suite.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Applying second spacing pass: increase y-axis label gutters and move x-axis category positions inward further to eliminate Baseline/Cycle labels directly under y tick labels.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Second spacing pass complete: increased left/right chart margins, increased x-axis edge padding, and widened y-axis gutters/tick margins so category labels no longer sit directly under y-axis ticks. Verified with OptimizerMetricsChart + ProcedureTask optimizer tests (pass).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Applying axis-label alignment tweak: move left y tick labels further left and right y tick labels further right to align vertically above AC1/Acc captions.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Moved y-axis tick columns outward to match AC1/Acc caption positions: increased left/right axis widths, increased tickMargin on both axes, and expanded chart side margins. Verified optimizer chart and ProcedureTask optimizer tests pass.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Switching to simpler axis-label approach: remove absolute AC1/Acc overlays and render AC1/Acc within custom YAxis tick renderer on the bottom tick so labels are guaranteed in same column as tick values.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Simplified axis labeling per request: removed absolute AC1/Acc overlays and implemented custom left/right YAxis tick renderers that render AC1 under -1.0 and Acc under 0% in the same tick text column. Increased chart bottom margin slightly to avoid clipping. Chart tests pass.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Adjusting AC1/Acc vertical placement: moving labels lower beneath their y-axis ticks while keeping the same horizontal column alignment.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Moved AC1/Acc labels lower beneath their ticks by increasing tspan dy from 1.2em to 1.5em in custom YAxis tick renderer. Verified OptimizerMetricsChart test passes.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Aligned AC1/Acc with x-axis label row by switching to fixed Y-offset label placement in custom y-tick renderers (y + 16 from bottom y-tick), instead of cumulative tspan dy. OptimizerMetricsChart test passes.
